mentions.note: GLP-1 injectable dominance (21% weight loss vs. 15% for Novo); joint venture with Nvidia on addiction treatment trials; expanding indication pipeline supports 10%+ rally.

Post-breakup (sold 60% Topgolf stake to Leonard Green for $1B, kept 40%). $200M buyback announced. Stock ran $12→$16, pulled back to $14+, now 34x forward earnings. Cramer was too negative pre-breakup; now gotten away on valuation. Golf boom real but entry point less attractive.
